name_en: Name: FENDI Mon Tresor Bucket Bag
name_cn:
Name: FENDI Mon Tresor Bucket Bag
Quality: Original Order
Model: 8802
Color: Burgundy
Size: 12*18*10cm
Fendi's latest masterpiece, featuring the standout vintage FF letter embossed print, a classic pattern loved for a long time. The exquisite bucket shape adds to its outstanding appeal, looking beautiful when worn. Based on authentic purchase patterns, original order level, exquisite workmanship.
